zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Cysoing, II於1157年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯時，他的父親Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM42歲，母親Pétronille21歲。他於大約1184年與Mabille De Guines - De Marck在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Cysoing, II于1157年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯时，他的父亲Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM42岁，母亲Pétronille21岁。他于大约1184年与Mabille De Guines - De Marck在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Cysoing, II was born in 1157, in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, was 42 and his mother, Pétronille, was 21. He married Mabille De Guines - De Marck about 1184, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1220, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Cysoing, II est né en 1157, à Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Pétronille, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mabille De Guines - De Marck environ 1184, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1220, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Cysoing, II 1157 in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM 42 und seine Mutter Pétronille 21. Er hat um 1184 in Frankreich Mabille De Guines - De Marck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1220 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Cysoing, II è nato il nel 1157 nel Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Pétronille, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mabille De Guines - De Marck circa 1184, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1220, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Cysoing, IIが1157年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスで生まれた時，父Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEMは42歳，母Pétronilleは21歳であった。約1184年にフランスでMabille De Guines - De Marckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Cysoing, II(이)가 1157년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Pétronille(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1184년 프랑스에서 Mabille De Guines - De Marck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Cysoing, II nasceu em 1157, em Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabille De Guines - De Marck aproximadamente 1184, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1220, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Cysoing, II родился в 1157 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Pétronille, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabille De Guines - De Marck около 1184 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1220 г. в его родном городе.

sm.van 1197 to 1220: mai le 1197 e o'o I le 1220

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Cysoing, II nació en 1157, en Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jan Ier VAN PETEGHEM, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Pétronille, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mabille De Guines - De Marck aproximadamente 1184, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1220, en su pueblo.
